_readme: Queries use PubMed field tags ([tiab]=title/abstract, [mh]=MeSH). For preprints (Europe PMC) the field tags are stripped automatically and the Boolean structure is reused. The LLM relevance filter is the real precision step: edit `interest_profile` in plain English to tune what gets kept. Tune recall with the queries; tune precision with the profile + relevance_threshold.
interest_profile: I am a computational genomics researcher focused on the GENETICS and GENOMICS of structural/inherited heart disease. I care most about: (1) congenital heart disease (CHD) gene discovery, de novo and rare variant analysis, exome/genome sequencing in CHD cohorts, and CHD-neurodevelopmental overlap; (2) dilated cardiomyopathy (DCM) genetics and PRS; (3) spontaneous coronary artery dissection (SCAD) genetics; (4) polygenic risk scores and oligogenic/digenic/multi-locus genetic architecture as METHODS, especially integrating rare and common variation; (5) DNA methylation, episignatures, and multi-omics in CHD/DCM. I want primary human genetics/genomics research and methods papers. I am NOT interested in: pure surgical/clinical outcome studies with no genetics, animal-only studies with no human relevance, drug trials, imaging-only studies, case reports of a single non-genetic patient, or papers where genetics is mentioned only in passing.

CHD_Genetics.description: Genetic / genomic studies in congenital heart disease
queries: ("congenital heart disease"[tiab] OR "congenital heart defect"[tiab] OR "congenital heart defects"[tiab] OR "Heart Defects, Congenital"[mh]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR exome[tiab] OR "whole genome"[tiab] OR "de novo"[tiab] OR "rare variant"[tiab] OR "rare variants"[tiab] OR mutation*[tiab] OR "copy number"[tiab] OR GWAS[tiab] OR "genome-wide"[tiab] OR sequencing[tiab])

("dilated cardiomyopathy"[tiab] OR "Cardiomyopathy, Dilated"[mh]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR exome[tiab] OR "rare variant"[tiab] OR "rare variants"[tiab] OR "truncating variant"[tiab] OR titin[tiab] OR TTN[tiab] OR mutation*[tiab] OR GWAS[tiab] OR "genome-wide"[tiab] OR sequencing[tiab])

("spontaneous coronary artery dissection"[tiab] OR "coronary artery dissection"[tiab]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR variant*[tiab] OR GWAS[tiab] OR "genome-wide"[tiab] OR heritab*[tiab] OR familial[tiab] OR polygenic[tiab])

CHD_DCM_SCAD_PRS.description: Polygenic risk scores in CHD, DCM, or SCAD specifically
queries: ("polygenic risk score"[tiab] OR "polygenic score"[tiab] OR "polygenic risk"[tiab] OR PRS[tiab]) AND ("congenital heart"[tiab] OR "dilated cardiomyopathy"[tiab] OR "coronary artery dissection"[tiab] OR cardiomyopathy[tiab])

Architecture_Methods.description: PRS / genetic-architecture methodology: oligogenic, digenic, multi-locus, rare+common integration
queries: (oligogenic[tiab] OR digenic[tiab] OR "multi-locus"[tiab] OR multilocus[tiab] OR "genetic architecture"[tiab] OR "rare variant burden"[tiab]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR inheritance[tiab] OR "risk score"[tiab] OR polygenic[tiab])
(polygenic[tiab] AND ("rare variant"[tiab] OR "rare variants"[tiab] OR monogenic[tiab] OR Mendelian[tiab]) AND (integrat*[tiab] OR combin*[tiab] OR joint[tiab] OR omnigenic[tiab]))

CHD_Methylation.description: DNA methylation / episignatures / epigenetics in CHD
queries: ("DNA methylation"[tiab] OR episignature*[tiab] OR epigenetic*[tiab] OR epigenome[tiab]) AND ("congenital heart"[tiab] OR "Heart Defects, Congenital"[mh])

("dilated cardiomyopathy"[tiab] OR "Cardiomyopathy, Dilated"[mh]) AND ("RNA-seq"[tiab] OR transcriptom*[tiab] OR "multi-omics"[tiab] OR multiomic*[tiab] OR "DNA methylation"[tiab] OR epigenom*[tiab] OR proteom*[tiab])
